001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq;
002
003import org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication;
004import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.SpringBootApplication;
005
006/**
007 * Spring Boot application entry point for the SeeSomethingABQ server.
008 */
009@SpringBootApplication
010public class SeeSomethingAbqApplication {
011
012
013  /**
014   * Launches the Spring Boot application.
015   *
016   * @param args command-line arguments.
017   */
018  public static void main(String[] args) {
019    SpringApplication.run(SeeSomethingAbqApplication.class, args);
020  }
021
022}
